zh.lifeSummary: Frances Frost是Mr. Frost和Mrs. Frost的女兒，於大約1553年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可。她於1567年5月1日與John Armesby在英國英格蘭素福爾可索普 莫利額結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可考費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Frances Frost是Mr. Frost和Mrs. Frost的女儿，于大约1553年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可。她于1567年5月1日与John Armesby在英国英格兰素福爾可索普 莫利額结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可考費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Frost
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Danish, and Swedish: nickname for someone who suffers from being cold, or perhaps used in the sense ‘frosty, cold as frost, without warmth of feeling’, or perhaps ‘having the appearance of being covered with frost’ for one with white hair or a white beard. From Old English, Old High German, Old Norse frost ‘frost’.

variants.name: Chell
meanings: English (Staffordshire): from an unrecorded Middle English male or female personal name Chell(e) or Chele, Old English Cēolla, Cēol, or Cēola, short forms of names beginning with Cēol- ‘ship’, such as Cēolbeorht (male) and Cēolflǣd (female). Alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English chele, chile (Old English cīele, cēle, cȳle) ‘cold, lacking sympathy’. Compare Frost .

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: Frances Frost was born about 1553, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Mr. Frost and Mrs. Frost. She married John Armesby on 1 May 1567, in Thorpe Morieux, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She was buried in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Frances Frost est née environ 1553, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Mr. Frost et Mrs. Frost. Elle a épousé John Armesby le 1 mai 1567, à Thorpe Morieux, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elleenterrée à Cockfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances Frostは約1553年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでMr. FrostとMrs. Frostの娘として生まれた。1567年5月1日にイギリスイギリススフォルクソルペ モーイエウックスでJohn Armesbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリススフォルクコクフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Frances Frost(은)는 대략 1553년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Mr. Frost(와)과 Mrs. Frost의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1567년 5월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 소 모리우스에서 John Armesby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 콕필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Frances Frost nasceu aproximadamente 1553, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Mr. Frost e Mrs. Frost. Ela casou-se com John Armesby em 1 de maio de 1567, em Thorpe Morieux, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Frances Frost родилась около 1553 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Mr. Frost и Mrs. Frost. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Armesby 1 мая 1567 г. в местности таурп мориеукс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она была похоронена в местности коккфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
